Raw/readout-aware review of image145844_reimage_r01 strong-pi pODMR: no clear usable resonance supported. Do not use this candidate for T2star; move to next fresh re-image seed.

Strong-pi pODMR completed for freshly tracked image145844_reimage_r02; savedexperiment 1DExp-seq-Rabimodulated-vary-mw_freq-2026-05-13-162726.mat, 4 averages x 20000 repetitions, final counts text 38.776 kcps. Raw/readout-aware review was completed before resonance decision.

Raw/readout-aware review of image145844_reimage_r02 strong-pi pODMR: no clear usable resonance supported. Combined signal and both normalization views show comparable fluctuations, the deepest point-wise ratio feature is reference-denominator-driven, average 4 is drift-flagged with about 31% common-mode drop, and a descriptive dip fit is boundary/unphysical. Do not use r02 for T2star; move to r03.

Queued standalone TrackCenter execute job for image145844_reimage_r03 at seed [117.166667, 118.166667, 116.000] um after r01 and r02 lacked clear usable strong-pi pODMR resonance. minimum_final_kcps=8; bridge job now blocks further bridge submissions until terminal.

r02 rejected by raw pODMR review; r03 tracking started: The r02 strong-pi pODMR completed with good final counts, but raw/readout-aware review did not support a clear usable resonance: raw and normalized features are inconsistent, average 4 is drift-flagged, and the descriptive dip fit is boundary/unphysical. r02 is rejected for alignment selection for now. TrackCenter completed for third fresh re-image seed image145844_reimage_r03. Final counts 43.535 kcps at tracked position [117.314436,117.761644,115.141679] um; selected z attempt 2; no tracker abort. This supports running the r03 strong-pi pODMR alignment screen after queue/advisory checks.

Started r03 strong-pi pODMR after fresh TrackCenter. Uses reduced 11-point +/-50 MHz grid, 4 averages x 20000 repetitions, mod_depth=1, length_rabi_pulse=52 ns; advisory estimated 141 s per average and high recent drift risk. Running job blocks further bridge submissions.

Strong-pi pODMR completed for freshly tracked image145844_reimage_r03; savedexperiment 1DExp-seq-Rabimodulated-vary-mw_freq-2026-05-13-172017.mat, 4 averages x 20000 repetitions. Raw/readout-aware review supports a clear usable resonance at the 3.875 GHz grid point.

Raw/readout-aware review of image145844_reimage_r03 strong-pi pODMR: clear usable resonance supported. Raw signal, point-wise ratio, and reference-line normalization all have their deepest dip at 3.875 GHz; raw signal drop is about 16.6% vs edge median; all 4 stored averages show a center-point drop; drift analysis flags no averages. Accept r03 as first aligned candidate and run weak-pi pODMR to refine mw_freq before Ramsey/T2star.

Weak-pi pODMR planning model and pre-enqueue advisory for accepted r03. Model uses 3.875 GHz strong-pi resonance, mod_depth=0.1, 0.57 us pulse, +/-10 MHz scan with 1 MHz spacing, 4 x 50000 shots. Advisory predicted high recent drift risk but per-average window below suggested cap and no recommended actions/blockers.
